name: @langchain/langsmith-claude-code-plugins
description: Claude Code plugin for LangSmith tracing

scripts.postbuild: chmod +x dist/hooks/user-prompt-submit.js dist/hooks/post-tool-use.js dist/hooks/stop.js dist/hooks/stop-failure.js dist/hooks/subagent-stop.js dist/hooks/pre-compact.js dist/hooks/post-compact.js dist/hooks/session-end.js
